title: Granular permissions for new Resource Planner features
excerpt:

posts.author: jeromie (Jeromie Clark)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m hoping this is just a “we’re shipping the MVP” thing and you’re planning to sort this later.

In the context of an enterprise account, I’m sure you can imagine how it’s not helpful that I now need to grant full admin access to every manager in my company that wants to track their employee resources here.

I don’t understand why reasonably granular permissions are consistently an afterthought in your product management decisions, especially for what you charge.

Is there a roadmap or timetable somewhere that indicates when a useful permission scheme around this feature will be added?
